title: Point-in-time information
description: A decision at time t may only use observations, estimates, and labels available at or before time t.

title: Prefix-scoped estimation
description: Parameters used for online row-level decisions should be estimated on a prior prefix, a rolling window, or another explicitly valid training split.

title: Execution contract integrity
description: Generated code must use provided data bindings and permitted libraries rather than hidden files, hardcoded paths, or unavailable dependencies.

title: Risk before optimization
description: Trading code should handle downside constraints and tail-risk protections before optimizing attractive performance summaries.
